title: Weberaster radulinus
taxonomy: Weberaster radulinus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The classification of Weberaster radulinus includes being in the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically in the clade Angiosperms. Weberaster radulinus is further classified as being in the subclass Asteridae and in the order Asterales. The species is also known by its common name, which is not widely documented, but it is likely to be a local name in South Africa.
